visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short black hair wears white over-ear headphones and sits at a wooden desk with a professional microphone in front of light-colored cabinets. He is smiling and listening attentively. (2) A woman with long dark hair in a light green shirt appears in a living room setting, speaking with animated gestures against a background of shelves and a lamp. (3) The scene shifts to a recording studio environment where three people—two women and the man from the first phase—are seated around a large wooden table with several microphones. They are wearing headphones and laughing. (4) The camera captures multiple close-up shots of each individual as they take turns singing into the microphones, exhibiting high energy and dramatic facial expressions during their vocal 'takes'. (5) The man is shown struggling and putting in significant physical effort to reach high notes, his face reddening as he sings while the others react with amusement. (6) The group is shown together for the final sequence, singing in unison while looking at each other and the microphones, concluding with a sense of accomplishment and humor.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 蔡宗翰!!! 唱歌竟然被誇獎!! (2) [Subtitle]: 你剛剛那個完全可以用!! (3) [Variety]: (有點驕傲) [Subtitle]: 完全可以用. (4) [Slogan]: 那天我以為... 重金邀請... 蔡氏三巨頭. (5) [Variety]: 怎麼我們也要!? 音量注意 [Subtitle]: 二伯 TAKE 1. (6) [Subtitle]: 二伯 TAKE 2. 你上一個比較好, 我用上一個好了. (7) [Variety]: 抱歉. (8) [Subtitle]: +0 TAKE 1. (9) [Subtitle]: +0 TAKE 2. (10) [Variety]: 裝可愛!!! [Subtitle]: +0 TAKE 3. (11) [Variety]: (驚訝!!) 很棒!!! (12) [Subtitle]: 宗翰 TAKE 1. (13) [Subtitle]: 宗翰 TAKE 2. (等待老師回饋中...) (14) [Subtitle]: 你再幫我唱一次就好. 這段不能用嗎...? 你剛剛那個完全可以. (15) [Variety]: (驕傲的) [Subtitle]: 完全可以用. (16) [Subtitle]: 宗翰 TAKE 加錄. 你剛剛其實唱太高了. 你一直突破自己. (17) [Variety]: (這算褒還是貶?) (18) [Slogan]: 最後來聽一下大家一起唱的. (再期待一下!!成品就快完成了).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator and 2 main female collaborators throughout the recording session.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male with a buzz cut wearing a white t-shirt and white headphones; a female with long dark hair in a blue hoodie; a female with long dark hair in a striped shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional-looking indoor studio with acoustic treatments or modern cabinets, a large wooden table with multiple microphone arms, and a secondary indoor living room background with domestic furniture.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A friendly male voice initiates the track with clear conversational tones while a light, rhythmic acoustic-pop BGM plays. The environment is acoustically treated with minimal floor noise. (2) A series of sharp vocalizations from a female voice start, marked by 'Ha' sounds in a high-pitch contour and high arousal. Each take is separated by a brief pause or vocal feedback. (3) A distinct 'Whoosh' and 'Impact' sound effect triggers a transition to a second female voice attempting the same melody with exaggerated comedic effort. (4) The track features several loud, collective bursts of laughter that overlap with the music and speech. (5) A male voice enters with a strained, very high-pitched singing take, showing significant vocal effort and subsequent comedic failure, followed by supportive but humorous comments from others. (6) The audio culminates in a multi-layered vocal chorus where all three voices sing the same melody in harmony, accompanied by a fuller musical arrangement that ends on a bright, final note.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Series of Failed Takes -> Successful Collaboration
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a humorous and engaging behind-the-scenes look at a vocal recording session, highlighting the chemistry and fun interactions between the creators through their mistakes and final group effort.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of variety-show style text overlays and fast-paced jump cuts to emphasize the comedic timing of the recording outtakes. The high valence and arousal in both visual and audio modalities suggest a strongly positive, entertainment-focused objective.
